response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development and leadership roles, but his background is heavily skewed toward web and scripting languages (JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, React) rather than C++. While he has some C/C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI), it does not appear to be his primary focus or a recent skill. His lack of demonstrated experience with industrial automation, message brokers, or secure development practices per IEC 62443 standards further limits his fit for this role.
strengths: Strong leadership and mentorship experience in software development teams
Extensive full-stack development expertise across multiple languages and platforms
Proven ability to architect and deliver scalable, high-performance systems
concerns: Limited recent or deep C++/STL development experience, which is core to the role
No clear evidence of industrial automation, IoT, or message-broker-based system experience
Lack of demonstrated knowledge of IEC 62443 standards or secure development lifecycle practices
